invalid_session_message: This session is no longer valid. Please scan the QR code again.
guest_count_description: How many people are dining at your table?
passcode_share_instructions: Share this code with others at your table so they can join your order.
passcode_instructions: Others can scan the table QR code and enter this passcode to join.
passcode_share_message: Share this 4-digit code with others at your table so they can join your order:
join_session_description: There's an active order at this table. Enter the 4-digit passcode to join.
join_failed: Couldn't join this session. Please try again.
invalid_passcode_error: Incorrect passcode. Please ask your host and try again.
start_session_failed: Couldn't start your session. Please try again.
ask_for_passcode_instruction: If you don't have the passcode, please ask the person who started the order.
session_expired_message: Your order session has been completed or expired. Thank you for your visit!
session_expired_instruction: To place a new order, please scan the QR code on your table again.
invalid_table_message: The table ID is invalid or doesn't belong to this restaurant.
invalid_table_instruction: Please scan a valid QR code from a table at this restaurant.
